name: Integration Testing
description: Real DB + Redis E2E integration testing, 4 failure modes resolved, converged at Trial 14

name: Frontend
description: Next.js 15 + shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS 4, 24 FMs resolved, converged at Trial 20

name: Specifications
description: Structured specification and traceability, converged at Trial 27

name: Infrastructure
description: Docker, CI/CD, Prisma migrations, seed scripts, env verification

name: Monorepo
description: Turborepo 2 + pnpm workspaces, packages/shared, cross-package types. Converged T35 with caveats.

name: Security
description: OWASP Top 10, rate limiting, CORS/CSP, Helmet.js, dependency audit. 15 FMs resolved (#76-90). Converged T37 (avg 96.3/110).

name: Performance
description: Response time interceptor, pagination clamping, Prisma optimization, caching headers, N+1 prevention. 3 FMs (#91-93). Converged T39 (avg 104.7/120).

name: Monitoring
description: Pino structured logging, /health + /health/ready, correlation IDs, GlobalExceptionFilter, metrics. 5 FMs (#94-98). Converged T42 (avg 113.3/120).

name: Cross-Layer Integration
description: Full 10-layer integration: APP_GUARD/FILTER/INTERCEPTOR chain, shared package >8 exports, validateEnvVars, error-path verification. 4 FMs (#99-102). Converged T44 (avg 113.7/120).
